certificate_manager_certificates.description: List of SSL certificates to be associated with the HTTPS proxy, managed by Certificate Manager. Must be in the same region as the proxy.

description.description: Specifies the text for the optional user-provided description of the HTTPS proxy.

http_keep_alive_timeout_sec.description: Defines the timeout, in seconds, for keeping idle HTTP connections alive. Must be between 1 and 3600.

name.description: Unique name for the HTTPS proxy resource; must be 1-63 characters long and comply with RFC1035.

server_tls_policy.description: Specifies the TLS policy for the HTTPS proxy, defining the server-side SSL configuration and requirements. Must be a valid resource name in the same project and region.

ssl_certificates.description: List of SSL certificates to use for HTTPS connections; must be self-managed or Google-managed certificates.

ssl_policy.description: Specifies the SSL policy to be associated with the HTTPS proxy, defining the set of SSL features and minimum TLS version for connections. Must be the self-link of an existing SSL policy.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations, allowing customization of timeout settings for managing the HTTPS proxy resource.

url_map.description: Specifies the URL map resource that defines the mapping of URLs to backend services for the HTTPS proxy. Must be a valid URL map in the same region.
